pages.text: A Forest Skyseed always grows a forest — grass and trees — and takes its cues from the biome it lands in: the local tree species, a pond in watery places, sandy ground on beaches and in deserts. Radius 7–10, flat-ish domed top, rocky underside. Coal is common in its core; iron a little rarer.

$(bold)Where it lands matters$()$(br)$(li)Forest: oak and birch; savanna: acacia; taiga: spruce.$(li)Ocean, river, swamp: a wood around a pond.$(li)Beach / desert: a drier wood with sandy ground and dead bushes.$(li)Plains: a lighter, more open wood.
